Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute at 26th/St. Louis
ShortDescription: 60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to street blockage near 26th/St. Louis.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 26th, Kedzie, Cermak, Central Park, 26th and over regular route due to street blockage near 26th/St. Louis.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #54 Cicero Temporary Southbound  Reroute near Cicero/Irving Park
ShortDescription: SB 54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Cicero/Irving Park.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #54 Cicero buses are temporarily rerouted via Cicero, Irving Park, Laramie, Addison, then resume their normal route on Cicero due to street blockage near Cicero/Irving Park.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #22 Clark and #152 Addison Temporary Reroute near Clark/Addison
ShortDescription: #22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Clark/Addison.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#22 Clark and #152 Addison buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to street blockage near Clark/Addison.

#22 Clark buses will operate via Clark, Racine, Belmont, then resume their normal route on Clark.

#152 Addison buses will operate via Addison, Racine, Belmont, Halsted, then resume their normal route on Addison.

Allow extra travel time.
